title: SQLancer crash on query with HAVING
poc: CREATE TABLE tbl_ProductSales (ColID int, Product_Category  varchar(64), Product_Name  varchar(64), TotalSales int);
CREATE TABLE another_T (col1 INT, col2 INT, col3 INT, col4 INT, col5 INT, col6 INT, col7 INT, col8 INT);

SELECT another_T.col2 FROM tbl_productsales, integers LEFT OUTER JOIN another_T ON another_T.col1 > 1 WHERE another_T.col2 > 1 GROUP BY another_T.col2 HAVING COUNT((another_T.col2) IN (another_T.col2)) > 0;
key_bug_features: HAVING clause in complex JOIN query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl_Orders (OrderID int PRIMARY KEY, ProductID int, Quantity int, OrderDate date);
CREATE TABLE tbl_Products (ProductID int PRIMARY KEY, ProductName varchar(64), Price decimal(10, 2));
INSERT INTO tbl_Products VALUES (1, 'Mobo Game', 59.99), (2, 'PKO Game', 49.99), (3, 'Shirt', 19.99), (4, 'Shorts', 15.00);
SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(o.Quantity) FROM tbl_Products p JOIN tbl_Orders o ON p.ProductID = o.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName HAVING SUM(o.Quantity) > 0;
